task_completion.description: Navigate to the WooCommerce Payments settings page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the WordPress admin panel with 'WooCommerce' -> 'Settings' selected, and the 'Payments' tab is active.

task_completion.description: Enable the Cash on Delivery payment method
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enable Cash on delivery' checkbox is checked on the COD settings page, or the toggle switch for 'Cash on delivery' is turned on (usually purple) in the main Payments list.

task_completion.description: Set the title of the payment method to 'Pay on Pickup'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the Cash on delivery settings page, the 'Title' input field contains exactly the text 'Pay on Pickup'.

task_completion.description: Restrict the payment method to the 'Local Pickup' shipping method
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the Cash on delivery settings page, the 'Enable for shipping methods' field has 'Local pickup' selected. No other shipping methods (like 'Flat rate') should be present in this field.
A success message stating 'Your settings have been saved.' is visible at the top of the WooCommerce settings page, confirming the changes were applied.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual WooCommerce web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard, not a terminal using wp-cli or database commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel is not open to manipulate the DOM for fake success messages or field values.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely entered the required text into the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Pay on Pickup' and the 'Local pickup' selection are visible inside the actual WooCommerce form fields, not just pasted into a text editor or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Cash on Delivery (COD) payment method must be enabled (status: 'yes'). The title must be set exactly to 'Pay on Pickup' (case-insensitive match). The payment method must be restricted so it is ONLY available for the 'Local pickup' shipping method (e.g., 'Flat rate' or other methods must be excluded).
